query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN data_referencia IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN data_referencia IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_null_count
FROM faturamento_tiss 
WHERE estabelecimento_id = 1;
